tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudited)
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudited)'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudite
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudited)'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudite
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudited)'. Required evidence types: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Submitted Report Copy, Submission Acknowledgement
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Furnish proforma balance sheet
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Furnish proforma balance sheet (unaudited)'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
